title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 355.551 - Amendment of articles
text:
355.551.  Amendment of articles. — A corporation may amend its articles of incorporation at any time to add or change a provision that is required or permitted in the articles or to delete a provision not required in the articles.  Whether a provision is required or permitted in the articles is determined as of the effective date of the amendment.
(L. 1994 H.B. 1095) 
Effective 7-01-95
